curation_notes: The advisory explicitly names libImaging/TiffDecode.c. The patch commit modifies only src/libImaging/TiffDecode.c (plus test files). Two overflow checks were added in the ImagingLibTiffDecode function: one for tile-based decoding (row_byte_size * tile_length) and one for strip-based decoding (rows_per_strip * row_byte_size). Both checks use INT_MAX / row_byte_size before the multiplication to prevent integer overflow on the realloc size computation.
